packages.direction: Introduce standardized task status tracking and lifecycle update monitoring.
evidence: Added TERMINAL_TASK_STATUSES, TaskUpdatedMessage, and TaskUpdatedStatus in version 0.2.106.
packages.name: claude-agent-sdk

packages.direction: Refactor model and endpoint configurations for multi-model targets, unified endpoints, and rich multimodal media assets.
evidence: Added GeminiModelOptions, ModelTarget, ModelType, ModelEndpoint, GeminiAPIEndpoint, VertexEndpoint.
Added Audio, Video, Image, and Document classes for multimodal input.
Removed GeminiConfig, GenerationConfig, ModelConfig, ModelEntry, and top-level mcp.
Replaced gemini_config with models field on LocalAgentConfig.
packages.name: google-antigravity

themes.name: Multimodal Agent Capability Expansion
themes.summary: The integration of native Audio, Video, Image, and Document types indicates the package is moving to fully-featured support for rich media processing within the agent's tool context and content layers.

themes.name: Heterogeneous Endpoint Abstraction
themes.summary: Decoupling model target definitions from proprietary configs (like GeminiConfig) to generalized model endpoints and targets signals a transition towards supporting diverse backend types (e.g. Gemini, Vertex, and other providers) seamlessly.

themes.name: Robust Task State Tracking
themes.summary: Standardization of terminal status constants and task update events guarantees status consistency, allowing the framework to observe and manage async task states deterministically.

uncertainty: Mapping logic and structural compatibility between legacy gemini_config options and the newly introduced models list.
The replacement strategy for the removed top-level mcp module in google-antigravity.
The precise data type and possible values contained in TERMINAL_TASK_STATUSES in claude-agent-sdk.
